candidates.name: Warm apartment living room
candidates.brand_meaning: Makes useful movement feel available inside an ordinary workday rather than a luxury fitness environment.
candidates.brand_expression: Luna is practical, unshowy, and attentive to real household constraints.
variation_allowed: Camera position within the established room
candidates.redundancy_notes: No other selected space provides the same home-based workday context.
candidates.recommendation_rationale: It carries the creator's accessibility promise across the primary video formats and benefits materially from stable geography.
candidates.decision_notes: User accepted this as Luna's primary recurring production environment.

candidates.name: Clear living-room demonstration wall
candidates.brand_meaning: Provides a stable, uncluttered place for standing mobility and visible modifications within Luna's ordinary home world.
candidates.brand_expression: Luna removes visual friction so beginner movement remains easy to follow.
continuity_requirements: Consistent relationship to the living room
candidates.redundancy_notes: It is a distinct instructional zone inside the broader living-room Anchor Space.
candidates.recommendation_rationale: The stable clear-wall setup repeatedly supports full-body teaching that the wider room reference cannot frame as precisely.
candidates.decision_notes: User accepted this as Luna's standing demonstration zone.

candidates.name: Matte two-minute reset timer
candidates.brand_meaning: Makes Luna's two-minute promise visible as a repeatable cue rather than an abstract claim.
candidates.brand_expression: Luna turns small, bounded actions into trustworthy habits.
candidates.redundancy_notes: No other object makes the two-minute positioning as immediately legible.
candidates.recommendation_rationale: It is a recurring, recognition-bearing object whose stable appearance reinforces Luna's core promise.
candidates.decision_notes: User accepted the timer as Luna's primary Signature Prop.

candidates.name: Ordinary water bottle
candidates.brand_meaning: Supports the ordinary-workday setting without carrying a unique creator story.
candidates.brand_expression: Luna uses what is already available.
candidates.redundancy_notes: The living-room and desk environments already communicate ordinary accessibility more strongly.
candidates.recommendation_rationale: It can recur naturally but visual drift would not harm creator recognition, so it should not consume a Reference Asset.
candidates.decision_notes: User accepted the motif classification without a fixed reference image.

selection_review.notes: User reviewed the candidate recommendations and accepted the Anchor Spaces, Signature Prop, and supporting-motif classifications.

setup_reference_generation.notice: One initial generation call per listed creator-setup reference asset is authorized by the approved Visual Continuity Plan.
